use_cases.AC1: Cart Review — user reviews cart contents and totals before checkout
use_cases.AC2: Checkout Information Entry — user provides shipping/contact info
use_cases.AC3: Order Overview — user reviews order summary, payment/shipping, and totals before confirming
use_cases.AC4: Order Completion — user confirms the order and receives confirmation
use_cases.AC5: Error Handling — invalid/incomplete input is rejected with clear feedback
use_cases.NAV: Navigation Flow — cancel/back-button behavior and cross-cutting session/state handling

business_rules.BR1: All checkout form fields are mandatory
business_rules.BR2: Users must be logged in to access checkout
business_rules.BR3: Cart cannot be empty when proceeding to checkout
business_rules.BR4: Order confirmation should clear the cart
business_rules.BR5: Users can cancel checkout at any step and return to cart

tests.title: Cart displays all added items with name, description, and price
Cart shows correct quantity per line item
Removing an item from the cart updates the list and badge count
Cart page renders correctly with zero items
Cart persists across navigation to a product detail page and back
Cart contents persist after a full page refresh
Adding all six catalog products displays each correctly in cart
Cart item name is a clickable link to its Product Detail page
Cart page does not display a subtotal/total price (AC1 discrepancy)
Checkout button redirects to Checkout Information page with required fields
Valid data in all fields and Continue proceeds to Overview page
Error shown when First Name is empty
Error shown when Last Name is empty
Error shown when Postal Code is empty
Only the first missing-field error is shown when all fields are empty
Error banner dismiss (X) control clears the message
Invalid field is visually highlighted with an error icon
Whitespace-only values are accepted (validation gap)
Special characters in Zip are accepted (AC5 gap)
Very long input string in First Name is accepted
Zip field accepts both numeric and alphanumeric postal codes
Cancel button on Checkout Information page returns to Cart with items intact
Cart badge count persists on the Checkout Information page header
Direct URL navigation to checkout-step-one.html works when logged in with items in cart
Checkout Information page is reachable even with an empty cart (business rule 3 gap)
Overview page lists all cart items with qty, name, description, price
Payment Information section is displayed
Shipping Information section is displayed
Item Total equals the sum of individual item prices
Tax and Total amounts are displayed and Total = Item Total + Tax
Cancel and Finish buttons are both present and enabled
Cancel button on Overview redirects to Products page (actual behavior)
Finish button navigates to the Order Confirmation page
Totals recalculate correctly with 3+ differently priced items
Totals are correct with exactly one item in cart
Overview page is directly reachable, bypassing Checkout Information entirely
Finish displays the order confirmation success message
Pony Express confirmation image is displayed
Cart is cleared immediately after order completion (business rule 4)
Cart remains empty after returning to Products page post-completion
Refreshing the confirmation page preserves the completion state
Header shows no cart badge on the confirmation page
Unauthenticated direct access to Cart page is blocked
Unauthenticated direct access to Checkout Information page is blocked
Unauthenticated direct access to Order Overview page is blocked
Unauthenticated direct access to Order Confirmation page is blocked
Invalid login credentials block all checkout access
Field validation errors surface one at a time in a fixed order
Checkout button remains active on an empty cart (business rule 3 gap)
Script-tag input is rendered as literal text, not executed
SQL-injection-style input is treated as literal text
Unicode/emoji characters in Last Name are accepted without crashing
Correcting fields one at a time surfaces the correct next error with no stale message
Refreshing the Checkout Information page mid-entry clears typed values
Full end-to-end checkout smoke path
Cancel on Checkout Information returns to Cart with items intact
Cancel on Overview returns to Products page, cart intact
Browser Back after order completion shows a stale, empty Overview page
Clicking Finish again from the stale post-completion Overview page still submits
Browser Back from Checkout Information returns to Cart page
User can skip the mandatory Checkout Information step via direct URL
Logging out mid-checkout redirects to Login and blocks further checkout access
Refreshing the Overview page (before completion) preserves order summary data

defects.title: Cart page displays no subtotal/total price
defects.steps: Add items to the cart and open the Cart page.
defects.expected: AC1: cart review shows the total price calculation.
defects.actual: No subtotal/tax/total is rendered anywhere on the Cart page; the total first appears on the Order Overview page.

defects.title: Empty cart does not block checkout access
defects.steps: Log in with an empty cart, open the Cart page or navigate directly to Checkout Information.
defects.expected: Business Rule 3: cart cannot be empty when proceeding to checkout.
defects.actual: The Checkout button remains enabled and clickable, and checkout-step-one.html loads normally with zero items in cart.

defects.title: Checkout Information step can be bypassed via direct URL
defects.steps: Log in, add an item to cart, navigate directly to checkout-step-two.html without visiting checkout-step-one.html first.
defects.expected: Business Rule 1: all checkout form fields are mandatory before an order can proceed.
defects.actual: The Order Overview page renders fully and Finish successfully completes the order, without First Name/Last Name/Zip ever being required.

defects.title: No format validation on Checkout Information fields
defects.steps: Enter whitespace-only, special-character, or very long values into First Name/Last Name/Zip and click Continue.
defects.expected: AC5 implies meaningful validation beyond presence-checking for invalid data.
defects.actual: All such values are silently accepted and the user proceeds to the Overview page — validation is presence-only.

defects.title: Overview Cancel returns to Products, not Cart
defects.steps: Reach the Order Overview page with items in cart, click Cancel.
defects.expected: Business Rule 5: users can cancel checkout at any step and return to cart.
defects.actual: Cancel on Overview redirects to the Products (inventory) page, not the Cart page. Cart contents remain intact either way.

defects.title: Stale post-completion Overview page allows re-submitting a cleared order
defects.steps: Complete a full checkout, then press the browser Back button and click Finish again.
defects.expected: Undefined by user story, but a completed/cleared order should not be re-submittable.
defects.actual: Back reveals a stale Overview page with $0 totals and an active Finish button; clicking it re-navigates to the Confirmation page despite the empty cart.

defects.title: Undocumented 'Generate PDF order' button on confirmation page
defects.steps: Reach the Order Confirmation page after completing checkout.
defects.expected: Undefined by AC4; noted for product-owner awareness.
defects.actual: A 'Generate PDF order' button is present alongside 'Back Home', with static Payment/Shipping info fixed across all orders — not mentioned in the acceptance criteria.
